languages.text: Аугмент в плохом состоянии, но, возможно, специалисты вашего флагмана смогут починить его.
The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.
languages.original_text: Аугмент в плохом состоянии, но, возможно, специалисты вашего флагмана смогут починить его.

traits.locale_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.
The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.
The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

languages.text: 増援は状態が悪いが、旗艦の技術官が修理できるかもしれない。
languages.original_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

traits.locale_text: 増援は状態が悪いが、旗艦の技術官が修理できるかもしれない。

languages.text: El aumento está en mal estado, pero tal vez los oficiales técnicos de la nave insignia puedan repararlo.
languages.original_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

traits.locale_text: El aumento está en mal estado, pero tal vez los oficiales técnicos de la nave insignia puedan repararlo.

languages.text: Die Augmentation ist in einem schlechten Zustand, aber vielleicht können sie die technischen Offiziere deines Flaggschiffs ja reparieren.
languages.original_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

traits.locale_text: Die Augmentation ist in einem schlechten Zustand, aber vielleicht können sie die technischen Offiziere deines Flaggschiffs ja reparieren.

languages.text: Cette augmentation a connu des jours meilleurs, mais peut-être que l'un des officiers techniques du vaisseau amiral sera en mesure de la réparer.
languages.original_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

traits.locale_text: Cette augmentation a connu des jours meilleurs, mais peut-être que l'un des officiers techniques du vaisseau amiral sera en mesure de la réparer.

languages.text: 该植入物状况欠佳，但或许你旗舰上的技术军官能够将其修复。
languages.original_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

traits.locale_text: 该植入物状况欠佳，但或许你旗舰上的技术军官能够将其修复。

languages.text: Ogment kötü durumda ancak belki sancak geminizin teknik subayları onu tamir edebilir.
languages.original_text: The augment is in poor condition, but perhaps your flagship's technical officers can repair it.

traits.locale_text: Ogment kötü durumda ancak belki sancak geminizin teknik subayları onu tamir edebilir.
